provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the National Library Service Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Establishment of a National Library Service
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of a National Library Service
The Minister may, after consultation with the Board, establish such library facilities, to be called the National Library Service, as in his opinion are desirable in order to further the provision of an efficient library service throughout Botswana.

definitions.definition: any part or division of a book, pamphlet, newspaper, periodical, magazine, review, Gazette , sheet of letterpress, sheet of music, map, plan, chart or table separately printed, but does not include any second or subsequent edition of a book where the first or earlier edition has been delivered in accordance with the provisions of section 10 (unless such edition contains additions or alterations either to the letterpress or in the maps, prints or other illustrative materials belonging thereto) or any book which will not be made available to the public at large or printed forms, industrial advertisements, advertisers' handbills, price lists or stationery
the National Library Service established under section 3
produced by any process of reproduction
issued for distribution, by sale or otherwise, to the public.
